steps.title: Convert feet to yards
steps.content:
Since $3$ feet $= 1$ yard, divide the speed in feet per second by $3$:
$$\tfrac{3}{17} \text{ ft/s} \times \tfrac{1 \text{ yd}}{3 \text{ ft}} = \tfrac{3}{17 \cdot 3} = \tfrac{1}{17} \text{ yd/s}$$

steps.title: Final value
steps.content:
The speed is $\tfrac{1}{17}$ yards per second.

The answer is 1/17.
